title: festuca rubens
intro: Festuca rubens, also known as red fescue, is a species of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is native to Europe and Western Asia, and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as digestive problems, respiratory infections, and skin conditions, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Festuca rubens can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a poultice or salve to aid in the treatment of various ailments.
